oneOf.description: URL or module path (mods://, asset://, https://, etc.)
Local HTML asset by registry ID

id.description:
A strongly-typed asset identifier.

Wraps a `String` but provides type safety so arbitrary strings cannot be
passed where an asset ID is expected. Serializes transparently as a plain
JSON string so the HTTP/JSON API schema is unchanged.
id.title: AssetId

source.description:
Webview source specification (request).
Either a URL/module path or inline HTML content.
source.title: WebviewSource
